title: urena lobata var. lappago
intro: Urena lobata var. lappago, also known as the Bur clover or Prickly bur, is a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The health benefits of Urena lobata var. lappago include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Urena lobata var. lappago include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
